heading: The defendant’s situation
accommodationQuestion: Would the defendant have somewhere else to live if they had to leave their home?
dateLabel: When would they be able to move in? (Optional)

date.notRealDate: The date the defendant would be able to move in must be a real date
date.pastDate: The date the defendant would be able to move in must be in the future
date.invalidValue: The date the defendant would be able to move in must be a real date
date.missingOne: The date the defendant would be able to move in must include a {{missingField}}
date.missingTwo: The date the defendant would be able to move in must include a {{first}} and {{second}}

errors.confirmAlternativeAccommodation: Select if the defendant would have somewhere else to live if they had to leave their home
